text.title: model-evaluation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for model-evaluation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Reporting MMLU or HumanEval as primary production quality signal.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Both benchmarks are saturating for frontier models — score differences are compressed and may not reflect production task performance. Use domain-specific test sets from real queries instead.

failure-mode.description: Using the same model for both generation and LLM-as-judge evaluation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Self-evaluation is systematically biased toward the model's own outputs. Always use a different judge model.
